programme.title: Divine Influencer
programme.desc: An influencer loses everything and soon learns the meaning of true influence.

programme.title: Ainsley McGregor Mysteries: A Case for the Yarn Maker
programme.desc: Former criminologist Ainsley McGregor investigates the mysterious murder of a renowned yarn maker.

programme.title: Fall Into Winter
programme.desc: Kerry's high school nemesis unexpectedly buys into Kerry's family-owned candy shop.

programme.title: God's Country Song
programme.desc: A charming but troubled country singer learns he has a 5-year-old son that he didn't know existed.

programme.title: Lease on Love
programme.desc: Poppy is a marketing specialist who fakes an engagement with her boss's handsome new client Milo.

programme.title: Divine Influencer
programme.desc: An influencer loses everything and soon learns the meaning of true influence.

programme.title: Ainsley McGregor Mysteries: A Case for the Yarn Maker
programme.desc: Former criminologist Ainsley McGregor investigates the mysterious murder of a renowned yarn maker.

programme.title: Fall Into Winter
programme.desc: Kerry's high school nemesis unexpectedly buys into Kerry's family-owned candy shop.

programme.title: God's Country Song
programme.desc: A charming but troubled country singer learns he has a 5-year-old son that he didn't know existed.

programme.desc: An influencer loses everything and soon learns the meaning of true influence.

programme.title: Ainsley McGregor Mysteries: A Case for the Yarn Maker
programme.desc: Former criminologist Ainsley McGregor investigates the mysterious murder of a renowned yarn maker.

programme.title: Fall Into Winter
programme.desc: Kerry's high school nemesis unexpectedly buys into Kerry's family-owned candy shop.

programme.title: Craft Me a Romance
programme.desc: The owner of an arts and crafts store is told she must sell her store or be forced out of business.

programme.title: Someone Like You
programme.desc: After the loss of his best friend, a young architect launches a search for her secret twin sister.

programme.title: Dream Wedding
programme.desc: When sisters Megan and Kate attend a local wedding fair, they enter for a dream wedding package.

programme.title: Romance at the Vineyard
programme.desc: A woman tries to save her family's vineyard from a wine chain that wants to buy the property.

programme.desc: A woman tries to save her family's vineyard from a wine chain that wants to buy the property.

programme.desc: Poppy is a marketing specialist who fakes an engagement with her boss's handsome new client Milo.
